title: escallonia × rockii
intro: Escallonia × rockii, a hybrid plant species, is a flowering shrub that is often used in hedges and ornamental gardens due to its attractive, white or pink flowers and compact growth habit. Traditionally, Escallonia × rockii has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in South America, where it is believed to possess antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Escallonia × rockii is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are also used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
